page.title: SubAgents
page.subtitle: Browse, manage, and maintain the SubAgents that top-level Agents can call.

list.empty: No SubAgents match the current filters

detail.empty: Select a SubAgent to view details
detail.noDescription: This SubAgent does not have a role description yet.
detail.availabilityHint: When enabled, top-level Agents and orchestration flows can keep referencing it. When disabled, the definition stays but should not be scheduled.
detail.readonlyHint: This is a readonly SubAgent, better suited for search, analysis, and organization tasks.
detail.writeHint: This SubAgent can run write-capable tasks and is better suited for execution-heavy work.
detail.defaultToolsFallback: No custom tool set is configured. The default tool set will be used.
detail.callReady: This SubAgent is currently ready to be called by higher-level Agents.
detail.callBlocked: This SubAgent is currently disabled and should not be called by higher-level Agents.

editor.createSubtitle: Define the minimum setup first, then refine it after creation.
editor.editSubtitle: Update description, prompt, tool scope, and availability.
editor.noTools: No tool choices are available right now. The default tool set will be used after save.

placeholders.name: Start with a letter, then use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens
placeholders.description: Describe what this SubAgent is responsible for
placeholders.prompt: Describe what it is good at, where its boundaries are, and how it should collaborate

validation.nameFormat: The name must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens
validation.projectWorkspaceRequired: Project-level SubAgents require an open workspace

deleteDialog.title: Delete SubAgent
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
